title: paranephelium macrophyllum
intro: Paranephelium macrophyllum, also known as the giant-leaved yellow passion fruit or giant yellow passion fruit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Paranephelium macrophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide antioxidant protection against free radicals. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, stems, and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
